chunks.title: Wisdom on Rulers and Justice
chunks.reason: A series of parallel proverbs contrasting the wicked and righteous regarding leadership, justice, and social standing.

chunks.title: Wisdom on Daily Conduct
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs focusing on personal integrity, wealth, family relations, and interaction with others.

chunks.title: Conclusion on the Wicked and Righteous
chunks.reason: A concluding summary verse describing the contrasting reactions of people to the rise and fall of the wicked.
